architecture.source: README.md - 软件硬件配套说明 + build.md

sample_commands.value: C++样例需启用 --build_test ON 并设置 BUILD_CPP_EXAMPLE=ON; Python样例安装whl包后执行 example/python/ 下的脚本

execution_log.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y cmake gcc g++ make python3 python3-dev python3-pip dos2unix git ninja-build lcov bc && pip3 install pybind11
execution_log.output: cmake 3.28.3, gcc 13.3.0, python 3.12.3, pybind11 3.0.4, ninja 1.11.1 installed

execution_log.command: git clone submodules from GitCode mirrors
execution_log.output: Replaced GitHub URLs with GitCode mirrors for: cpp-httplib, spdlog, googletest. Manually cloned: nlohmann/json (v3.12.0), prometheus-cpp-lite (commit 48d09c4), memfabric_hybrid. mockcpp cloned from GitHub (GitCode 403).
Error: script uses --build_mode flag, not positional args. Fixed in next attempt.

execution_log.error: fatal error: prometheus/simpleapi.h: No such file or directory
execution_log.output: prometheus-cpp-lite submodule was at wrong commit. Cloned from master (latest) instead of required commit 48d09c4.
Correct commit has core/ and simpleapi/ directories as expected by build system.
Build completed successfully. Artifacts: libmf_memcache.so (2.8M), _pymmc.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so (1.3M), mmc_meta_service (1.7M), memcache_hybrid-1.1.0-cp312-cp312-linux_x86_64.whl (1.6M)

UT build completed. 154 tests from 27 test suites ran. [PASSED] 154 tests. [FAILED] 0 tests. Coverage report generation failed due to lcov+GCC 13.3.0 compatibility issue (mismatched exception tag error).

execution_log.command: docker stop verification-env && docker rm verification-env

process_timeline.action: 读取 README.md, CMakeLists.txt, doc/build.md, script/build.sh, script/run_ut.sh
启动 Ubuntu 24.04 容器并挂载仓库
替换 GitHub 子模块 URL 为 GitCode 镜像并克隆
首次构建 - 参数格式错误
第二次构建 - prometheus 头文件缺失
修正 prometheus-cpp-lite 和 nlohmann/json 版本
第三次构建 - RELEASE 模式

process_timeline.result: 154/154 通过, 覆盖率报告生成失败

sample.reason: 样例执行需要安装whl包并配置MetaService/LocalService环境，且依赖MemFabric运行时。当前环境无Ascend NPU硬件，无法端到端运行样例。

documentation_gaps: README.md 中 '最佳实践' 章节标注为'推出中...'，内容缺失
构建文档未明确说明子模块必须使用特定commit版本（如prometheus-cpp-lite需要commit 48d09c4而非master最新）
文档中未提及GitHub子模块在某些网络环境下可能无法访问，未提供替代镜像源
单元测试覆盖率要求（lines >= 70%, branches >= 40%）在文档中未说明，仅在 run_ut.sh 脚本中硬编码
样例执行文档未明确说明需要MemFabric已安装且NPU硬件可用

problems_encountered.problem: 子模块 GitHub URL 无法访问（网络超时/403）
problems_encountered.solution: 将 .git/config 中的子模块 URL 替换为 GitCode 镜像（https://gitcode.com/<owner>/<repo>.git）。mockcpp 的 GitCode 镜像返回403，最终从 GitHub 克隆成功。
problems_encountered.source: 手动替换 git config submodule.*.url

problems_encountered.problem: 构建失败：prometheus/simpleapi.h 头文件缺失
problems_encountered.solution: prometheus-cpp-lite 子模块处于空仓库状态（master分支无提交）。需要切换到仓库记录的commit 48d09c45。该版本有 core/ 和 simpleapi/ 目录结构，与构建系统预期匹配。
problems_encountered.source: git ls-tree HEAD 3rdparty/prometheus-cpp-lite 查看正确commit

problems_encountered.problem: UT构建失败：nlohmann/json.hpp 头文件缺失
problems_encountered.solution: nlohmann/json 子模块目录为空（浅克隆不完整）。重新从 GitCode 克隆 v3.12.0 标签，确保 single_include/nlohmann/json.hpp 存在。
problems_encountered.source: CMakeLists.txt 第222行 include_directories 引用 3rdparty/nlohmann/json/single_include

problems_encountered.problem: lcov 覆盖率报告生成失败（geninfo ERROR: mismatched exception tag）
problems_encountered.solution: 这是 lcov 2.0 与 GCC 13.3.0 的已知兼容性问题。不影响测试结果——154个测试全部通过。可尝试升级 lcov 或使用 --ignore-errors 参数绕过。
problems_encountered.source: run_ut.sh 第72行 lcov 命令
